inputs.label: Travel Distance
inputs.businessContext: Total distance traveled. Based on standard route planning (ISO 14040).

inputs.label: Fuel Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Vehicle fuel efficiency. Typical values from manufacturer specs or EPA ratings.

inputs.label: Fuel Price
inputs.businessContext: Current fuel price per liter. Market rate from local fuel stations.

inputs.label: Vehicle Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of vehicle affects fuel efficiency and emission factors. Based on EPA vehicle classifications.

inputs.label: Load Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of vehicle capacity used. Affects fuel consumption per unit load. Lean logistics principle.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data. Used for risk adjustment. Based on Six Sigma DMAIC.

thresholds.fuelEfficiency < 5: Critical: Very low fuel efficiency, consider vehicle replacement.
thresholds.loadFactor < 50: Warning: Low load factor, optimize routing or consolidate shipments.
thresholds.dataConfidence < 70: Warning: Low data confidence, results may be unreliable.

suggestedActions: fuelEfficiency < 5 ? 'Replace vehicle with more efficient model' : ''
loadFactor < 50 ? 'Consolidate shipments to increase load factor' : ''
